# Daily AI News — 2026-03-15
## Cursor In Talks For Funding At $50 Billion Valuation, Says Report
Cursor is in talks for funding at a $50 billion valuation, which could make it one of the most valuable AI companies. This funding round could provide Cursor with the resources it needs to further develop its AI technology and expand its operations. The large valuation reflects the growing importance of AI in the tech industry.

## Musk's xAI Scraps AI Coding Tool, Poaches Cursor Execs
Musk's xAI has scrapped its AI coding tool, which was intended to help developers build AI models more easily. The company has also hired several executives from Cursor, which could help xAI improve its own AI technology. This move may indicate that xAI is shifting its focus towards more advanced AI applications.

## AI developers may not be keen on crypto, but stablecoins are the secret to agentic finance, crypto insiders say
Crypto insiders believe that stablecoins could play a key role in the development of agentic finance, which uses AI to make financial decisions. While many AI developers are not interested in cryptocurrency, stablecoins could provide a more stable and reliable way to use crypto in AI applications. This could lead to new opportunities for AI developers to create more sophisticated financial models.
